violations.text: Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Proper storage reviewed with PIC.Food was relocated. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
Food was observed being prepped on top of a garbage can. Food must be prepped on a sanitary prep surface. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Bowls removed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

Employee was observed washing hands with gloves on. Hands must be washed and gloves must be disposed of. Employee disposed of gloves and rewashed hands. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024

Raw animal foods were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Items were relocated, handout provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024

Various food were observed held at 43-44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was relocated to walk-in. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
A glue fly trap was observed stored above a food prep area. Fly trap was removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
Food was observed being prepped on top of a garbage cans. Food shall be prepped in a way to prevent contamination. PIC relocated food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024

The lowboy was observed iced up and unable to hold a temperature of 41 or below. Unit was taken out of service and must not be used until able to hold a temperature of 41 or below. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the equipment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Equipment to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
